    ps_3_0
    def c0, -0.5, 0.5, 0, 0
    dcl_texcoord_pp v0.xyz
    dcl_texcoord1_pp v1.x
    add_pp r0.xyz, v0, c0.x
    add_pp r1.xyz, r0, r0
    nrm_pp r0.xyz, r1
    mad_pp oC0.xyz, r0, c0.y, c0.y
    mov_pp oC0.w, v1.x

// approximately 7 instruction slots used
